summary: The diff implements all four requirements with good coverage. REQ-12 (backend owner role fix), REQ-13 (frontend auth context using 'owner' role), REQ-14 (light blue/white theme), and REQ-15 (logo removal) are all addressed. The backend main.mo uses 'owner' role in type comments and UserProfile, AuthContext.tsx explicitly stores role='owner' for OWNER001 with no 'admin' references, index.css defines a clean light blue/white theme with CSS custom properties, and Header.tsx shows only text 'Aditi Electricals' with no logo/image. Minor concerns exist around whether all backend authorization guards consistently use 'owner' since the AccessControl module is not shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: All authorization checks that currently use role === 'admin' must be changed to role === 'owner'. No reference to role 'admin' exists in any authorization check.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo visible code references AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller) in getUserProfile and likely other guards. The AccessControl module (authorization/access-control) is not shown in the diff, so it cannot be confirmed that the internal 'isAdmin' check uses 'owner' rather than 'admin' as the role string. This is a potential gap in the backend authorization fix.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added as a new file
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any migration module or data migration functionality. This is an added file not mentioned in any requirement.
